name: heuristic-client

metadata.name: heuristic-client
metadata.summary: A Python client for connecting your llm to the world

documentation:
# HeuristicSearch

A Python client for fetching search results from the Search API.

## Installation

```bash
pip install Heuristic

classes.name: heuristic-client.client.HeuristicSearch

methods.name: heuristic-client.client.HeuristicSearch.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the client with an API key.

```
param api_key

API key for authorization.
```

methods.name: heuristic-client.client.HeuristicSearch.search
documentation:
Perform a search query.

```
param query

Search query string.

param num_results

Number of results to return (default: 10).

param date_range

Optional date range filter ('day', 'week', 'month', 'year').

param engine

Optional list of search engines to use.

return

List of search results.
```
A client to interact with the search API.
